name: fju-course-platform
description: 輔仁大學課指組器材與場地預約平台 - Hono + Cloudflare Pages

scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name fju-course-platform
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
